description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image and defines two stages: build and test, with a global before_script executing `pip install -r requirements.txt`. In the build stage add the check_week_4_additional job (allow_failure, runs `test -e week_4/week4a.py`, triggers only on branches matching `/^lab[-_].*4$/` and excludes master and the CSUI-AdvProg-2017/lab-exercises project) and check_week_4_mandatory (no allow_failure, runs `test -e week_4/week4.py`, `test -e week_4/test_week4.py`, `test -e week_4/m1facade.txt` with the same triggers), plus prep_week_3, prep_week_4, prep_week_5, prep_week_6, prep_week_7, prep_week_8 jobs each running flake8 or file checks on their respective week directories and limited to the matching `/^week-<n>$/@CSUI-AdvProg-2017/lab-exercises` branches. In the test stage define grade_week_1_additional (allow_failure, runs `file week_1/form_a1.py` and `python week_1/form_a1.py` on `/^lab[-_].*1$/` branches) and grade_week_1_mandatory (runs `file week_1/form_m{1,2,3}.py` and `python week_1/form_m{1,2,3}.py`), grade_week_2_additional (runs `cd week_2/factory-method-pattern`, `python Tutorial2-FM-Dynamic.py`, `cat factoryMethodPattern.txt`), grade_week_2_mandatory (runs multiple python scripts and cat commands across factory-method-pattern and singleton-pattern), grade_week_3_additional, grade_week_3_mandatory, grade_week_4_additional, grade_week_4_mandatory (including `python -m unittest discover week_4`), grade_week_5_additional, grade_week_5_mandatory (running unittest modules in week_5), grade_week_6_additional, grade_week_6_mandatory (running observer scripts), and grade_week_7_additional, grade_week_7_mandatory (running queue scripts and cat files), each with the same except/only rules for their respective week numbers. All jobs inherit the global before_script, have allow_failure set as specified, and use the defined only regex patterns and except lists to control execution; no caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
